cand_f.notes: Highest score. Exact mathematical correspondence (W_dec^T W_dec = G_LCA). Verified novelty (no prior work). Explains H5 precision invariance. Training-free and scalable. Low pilot cost (~30 min). Clear go/no-go criteria.

cand_c.notes: Strong backup. Data supports trade-off view. Zero additional GPU time. Lower novelty (3/5) than cand_f. Clean pivot path if cand_f fails.

cand_a.notes: Zero hypotheses survive MCP. Quality plateau at 6.0/10. Steering-encoder confound is fundamental. 20 GPU-hours spent with diminishing returns.

cand_b.notes: No pilot data. Phenomenological approach lacks theoretical grounding compared to inhibition graph.

cand_d.notes: No pilot data. Metric validation is well-defined but less impactful than cand_f.

cand_e.notes: Merged into cand_f. No independent pilot data.

reasons: cand_f has highest weighted score (3.75) among all candidates
Exact structural correspondence: W_dec^T W_dec = G_LCA (not metaphorical)
Novelty verified: no prior LCA-SAE connection, no prior inhibition graph for SAE diagnostics
Explains the one robust prior finding (H5: precision invariance) via competitive suppression
Training-free: computed from pretrained SAE weights, no retraining needed
Scalable to million-latent SAEs: O(k * d_dict) complexity
Low pilot cost (~30 min GPU) with clear go/no-go criteria
cand_c is strong backup (3.55) with clean pivot path if cand_f fails
cand_a thoroughly tested and failed (1.30): zero significant results after MCP, quality plateau at 6.0/10
H6 falsification criterion is clear: precision@20 <= 0.05 triggers pivot to cand_c
next_actions: Execute pilot experiments for cand_f: construct inhibition graph (layer 8, k=20), validate H6 (precision@20 >= 0.10), test H7 (inhibition vs recall/precision), test H8 (graph stats vs absorption rate)
Apply go/no-go after pilots: GO -> full H6-H10; CAUTION -> diagnostic-only; NO-GO -> pivot to cand_c
If pilots pass, execute full experiments across layers 0/4/8/10 (~2 GPU-hours)
If pilots fail, execute cand_c pivot: reframe to trade-off analysis, reuse existing data (~1 GPU-hour)

pilot_go_criteria.go: H6 precision@20 >= 0.10 AND Fisher p < 0.001 -> proceed with full H6-H10 + optional cross-model
pilot_go_criteria.caution: H6 precision@20 = 0.05-0.10 -> proceed with diagnostic-only claims, drop H10 repair
pilot_go_criteria.no_go: H6 precision@20 <= 0.05 -> pivot to cand_c (trade-off analysis)

key_evidence.lca_sae_correspondence: W_dec^T W_dec = G_LCA (exact when weights tied)
key_evidence.prior_finding_H5: Precision = 1.0 universally at k>=5; recall varies --- explained by competitive suppression
key_evidence.prior_finding_H1b: Delta-corrected r=-0.431 at layer 8 (uncorrected) --- explained by layer-dependent inhibition strength

risk_assessment.primary_risk: No pilot data exists yet for cand_f; decision based on theoretical strength and verified novelty
risk_assessment.mitigation: Low pilot cost (~30 min) with clear go/no-go criteria; strong backup (cand_c) ready
risk_assessment.fallback: If H6 fails, immediate pivot to cand_c with zero additional data collection needed

iteration_context.note: pilot_experiments stage was incorrectly marked as completed without running cand_f pilots
